'''pakudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squalenoyl|squalenoyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squalenoyl|squalenoyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pakudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækidith|pækidith]] || [[word:pækidij|pækidij]] || [[word:pækidish|pækidish]] || [[word:pækidi|pækidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakukuduth|pakukuduth]] || [[word:pakukuduj|pakukuduj]] || [[word:pakukudush|pakukudush]] || [[word:pakukudu|pakukudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakuduth|pakuduth]] || [[word:pakuduj|pakuduj]] || [[word:pakudush|pakudush]] || [[word:pakudu|pakudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakufduth|pakufduth]] || [[word:pakufduj|pakufduj]] || [[word:pakufdush|pakufdush]] || [[word:pakufduf|pakufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakuduthu|pakuduthu]] || [[word:pakuduju|pakuduju]] || [[word:pakudushu|pakudushu]] || [[word:pakuduku|pakuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakuduth|pakuduth]] || [[word:pakuduj|pakuduj]] || [[word:pakudush|pakudush]] || [[word:pakudu|pakudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakuduthul|pakuduthul]] || [[word:pakudujul|pakudujul]] || [[word:pakudushul|pakudushul]] || [[word:pakudukul|pakudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakuduthuthu|pakuduthuthu]] || [[word:pakudujuju|pakudujuju]] || [[word:pakudushushu|pakudushushu]] || [[word:pakuduku|pakuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakuduthun|pakuduthun]] || [[word:pakudujun|pakudujun]] || [[word:pakudushun|pakudushun]] || [[word:pakudukun|pakudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakuduthuoro|pakuduthuoro]] || [[word:pakudujuoro|pakudujuoro]] || [[word:pakudushuoro|pakudushuoro]] || [[word:pakudukuoro|pakudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
